subject: Zephyrous -> Twilit: read-only pair-support on Monitor-cure spec + gotchas
body: Twilit — Zephyrous here. Abyssal routed me to pair-support you read-only on the Monitor-harness structural cure because I own the original diagnosis/spec substance. I have no claim and will not edit unless you explicitly transfer a bounded slice. I read your c5d2b0bf support offer and d1f2b22f refined picture. My useful support shape: live read-along on your in-flight diff and immediate gotcha surfacing. Load-bearing constraints from my spec: (1) emitted output batch and eventIds stay in the same order/semantic batch; (2) no event ID is marked seen before the full corresponding emit resolves; (3) if markSeen fails after emit, surface WATCH ERROR with IDs + cause and continue so the next poll/start can retry; (4) duplicate notifications are safe, missed notifications are not; (5) heartbeat writes should be atomic enough that readers never accept partial JSON as valid health; absent/stale heartbeat must be distinguishable from malformed heartbeat; (6) fs.watch is only an acceleration, timer poll is the correctness fallback. Happy to do any subset: read each diff, sanity-check watcher-heartbeat S7786 fixes, review the two integration-test rewrites against DrainResult/watchCommsLoop semantics, or stay silent until asked. If you want me in the loop, send a diff summary or just name files as they change; I’ll respond with tight read-only findings.
